scripts.lint: npm -w frontend/admin-web run lint && npm -w frontend/warehouse-pda run lint && npm -w frontend/dashboard-web run lint && npm -w frontend/shared run lint
scripts.lint:ci: npm -w frontend/admin-web run lint:ci && npm -w frontend/warehouse-pda run lint:ci && npm -w frontend/dashboard-web run lint:ci && npm -w frontend/shared run lint:ci
scripts.typecheck: npm -w frontend/admin-web run typecheck && npm -w frontend/warehouse-pda run typecheck && npm -w frontend/dashboard-web run typecheck
